object_notes: This is a CUSTOM object. In PU, rename a Grid (GR) subject area to 'Questions' — or use a spare custom object if available. This is NOT the native Questionnaires object, which has a fixed template structure unsuitable for a standalone question library.
description: Standalone question library with SCF crosswalk linkage. Questions map to Provisions via shared scf_control_ids (STRM). Each question has assessment metadata, AI answerability scoring, and threat linkage.
design_notes: Questions exist independently of any specific assessment or questionnaire template.
The scf_control_ids field is the universal join key — matching SCF control IDs on Provisions create the crosswalk.
AI Answerability indicates how much of the response can be auto-generated from an evidence vault.
threat_ids links questions to the Threat catalog via pipe-delimited Threat system_ids.
The [Name] standard property should hold the question short title (e.g., 'Q-IAM-001 MFA Enforcement').
The [External ID] standard property maps to system_id for import upsert.

standard_property_mappings.notes: Human-readable label combining the display ID and control name.
Brief summary of the question. Full question text goes in the dedicated question_text property.
Immutable upsert key. Must be unique. E.g., 'Q-IAM-001'.

display_tab.Label: Question Identity
display_tab.Tooltip: Core identifiers and classification for this question

steps.name: display_id
notes: Required. Must be unique across the question library.

steps.name: question_text

display_tab.Label: Question Text
display_tab.Tooltip: The full question text as presented to vendors during assessment.

notes: Required. Memo type to accommodate lengthy, multi-part questions.

steps.name: control_name

display_tab.Label: Control Name
display_tab.Tooltip: Short name of the control this question assesses. E.g., 'MFA Enforcement', 'Data Encryption at Rest'.

notes: Human-friendly control label for reporting and grouping.

display_tab.Label: Classification & Scoring
display_tab.Tooltip: Control group, weight, AI scoring, and response metadata

steps.name: control_group

display_tab.Label: Control Group
display_tab.Tooltip: Top-level control domain this question belongs to. Drives dashboard grouping and risk roll-ups.

notes: Uses Reference Data: 'Control Group'. Required for reporting and filtering.

steps.name: weight

display_tab.Label: Weight
display_tab.Tooltip: Relative importance weight for scoring. Higher weight = more impact on risk score. Default: 1.0.

notes: Used in weighted scoring calculations. Typically 0.5 to 3.0. Default 1.0.

steps.name: ai_answerability

display_tab.Label: AI Answerability
display_tab.Tooltip: How amenable this question is to AI-assisted response generation. High = auto-answer from evidence vault. Medium = AI drafts, SME reviews. Low = requires human judgment.

notes: Uses Reference Data: 'AI Answerability'. Drives automation routing in VendorShield.

steps.name: evidence_types

display_tab.Label: Evidence Types
display_tab.Tooltip: Pipe-delimited list of accepted evidence types. E.g., 'SOC 2 Report|Penetration Test|Policy Document'.

notes: Pipe-delimited values. Used by AI to identify relevant evidence documents in the vault.

steps.name: response_type

display_tab.Label: Response Type
display_tab.Tooltip: Expected response format: Yes/No/Partial/NA, Yes/No, Narrative, Numeric, Date, or File Upload.

notes: Uses Reference Data: 'Response Type'. Required. Determines how the question is rendered in assessments.

display_tab.Label: Source
display_tab.Tooltip: Origin of this question: GRX (Global Risk Exchange baseline), Expanded (VendorShield extended set), or Custom (organization-specific).

display_tab.Label: SCF Crosswalk
display_tab.Tooltip: Secure Controls Framework mapping — links questions to provisions

steps.name: scf_control_ids

display_tab.Label: SCF Control IDs
display_tab.Tooltip: Pipe-delimited SCF control IDs this question maps to. This is the universal join key — matching IDs on Provisions create the Question↔Provision crosswalk. E.g., 'IAC-06|IAC-01'.

notes: CRITICAL: This is the crosswalk anchor. Questions and Provisions that share SCF control IDs are linked. Populated by VendorShield from the SCF STRM.

steps.name: threat_ids

display_tab.Label: Threat IDs
display_tab.Tooltip: Pipe-delimited system_ids of Threats this question helps mitigate. E.g., 'T-MITRE-T1078|T-MITRE-T1110'.

notes: Links to Threat objects via their system_id. Pipe-delimited for many-to-many.

display_tab.Label: Last Synced At
display_tab.Tooltip: When VendorShield last pushed/updated this question.
